name: IRC_CX_CONV_TRACKING
description: Stores user conversation request and response tracking information in the career coach orchestration layers

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_LOG_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier for the conversation tracking. System generated value

columns.Name: USER_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Unique user request identifier for the user conversation on career site.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: Conversation identifier sent in the initial request

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates the site where the request is received.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Readable number generated for Candidate used in the site.

columns.Name: SESSION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for the user session

columns.Name: TRACE_ID
columns.Comments: Trace identifier received in the response

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Job identifier received in the response

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifier for the conversation workflow code

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_VERSION
columns.Comments: Workflow version used in the request

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
